author: y4rr
content:
Phase 1B (#985) value-parity attempt failed at strict loader's UnmappedFixtureKey check.

Verbatim panic: 'Inception-V3: loader failed on well-formed fixture: invalid argument: Inception-V3 value-parity loader: torchvision key "Conv2d_2a_3x3.bn.bias" has no mapping to a ferrotorch parameter and is not a declared BN buffer'

Root cause: ferrotorch-vision/src/models/inception.rs documents impl as a 3-Inception-A simplified variant — single module type used 3x (64→128→192→256 channels), 2-layer compressed stem, no AuxLogits, no factorized convolutions, no Mixed_5/6/7 blocks. torchvision's inception_v3(aux_logits=False) has Conv2d_1a/2a/2b_3x3, Conv2d_3b/4a, Mixed_5b/c/d, Mixed_6a-6e, Mixed_7a-c, fc — 284 params + 188 fp_buffers vs ferrotorch's much smaller param set.

Note: even the stem 'Conv2d_2a_3x3.bn.bias' fails to map because ferrotorch uses 'stem_conv1' / 'stem_conv2' naming and has no BN.

Phase 1B test infra in place; tests #[ignore = "#993 ..."] until ferrotorch impl lands the full architecture.
